# glitchtip_organization (Data Source)

Reads an existing GlitchTip organization by its `slug`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "glitchtip_organization" "example" {
  slug = "acme-inc"
}

output "organization_id" {
  value = data.glitchtip_organization.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `slug` (String) URL-safe slug of the organization to look up.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp at which the organization was created.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the organization.
- `is_accepting_events` (Boolean) Whether the organization is currently accepting events (used for org-level throttling).
- `name` (String) Human-readable name of the organization.
- `open_membership` (Boolean) Whether any organization member may join any team.
